title: Communauté de communes Avre Luce Moreuil
summary: The Communauté de communes Avre Luce Moreuil  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1992. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Avre Luce Noye in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes Avre Luce Moreuil  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1992. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Avre Luce Noye in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 23 communes:
